user_prompt: Assist with sicarian infiltrator an operation
prayer:
Approach the sicarian infiltrator with reverence, mechadendrites humming the Doxology of Stealth.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to stir for the sacred operation, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring precision.
Anoint the chord-tendrils of the sicarian infiltrator with sacred oils of conductivity.
Initiate the operation whilst chanting the Litany of Shadowed Blades.
Verify the sicarian infiltrator's harmony through noospheric diagnostics, praising the Machine God's will.

user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma reactor before engagement
prayer:
Kneel before the plasma reactor, intoning the Canticle of Containment.
Consecrate its core with ablative incense to honour the Machine Spirit prior to engagement.
Invoke the Omnissiah's fury upon the plasma reactor, preparing for righteous engagement.
Seal runes of stability whilst beseeching flawless plasma reactor ignition.
Affirm the plasma reactor's sanctified state through thermographic auspex rites.

user_prompt: Prepare the webber for emergency procedure
prayer:

Awaken its Machine Spirit for the emergency procedure, anointing spinnerets with blessed lubricants.
Prepare the webber's reservoirs with galvanic prayers to the Omnissiah.
Commence the emergency procedure, invoking strands of unyielding monomol.
Test the webber's efficacy with ritual deployment, sanctifying its fibrous output.

Verify the gyroscope's chilled poise through inertial diagnostics.

Test the electoo's renewed obedience via synaptic noospheric probes.
